div.div:
Visible spine = solid fill · Care alias = dashed blue (200, not redirect) · Frozen = dashed gray.
References: ADRs 0016 / 0022 / 0023 / 0024 · docs/architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md (Routes) · README route table.
